description_long: This house features a multi-level design with a prominent gable roof and a mix of modern and traditional architectural elements. The front facade showcases large windows, a covered entryway, and a spacious driveway with geometric paving. The rear of the house includes an elevated wooden deck with railings, accessible by a set of stairs, and multiple windows that provide ample natural light. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored siding, stone accents, and dark roofing tiles. The structure sits on a raised foundation with visible support columns beneath the deck. The overall layout suggests a comfortable suburban residence with both functional and aesthetic outdoor spaces.
description: A multi-level house with a gable roof, large windows, stone and siding exterior, and an elevated rear deck with stairs.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance, large windows, driveway, and a mix of stone and siding finishes.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the elevated wooden deck, stairs leading to the yard, and multiple windows along the back wall.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the length of the house, the gable roof structure, and additional windows along the side facade.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the garage area, secondary entrance, and the transition between different exterior materials.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and regular side windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, large front door, and stone accent walls
